ast.name: appendText
ast.source: Please download the
ast.target: 请下载

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: file (in
ast.target: 文件（

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: format) from
ast.target: 格式）从

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: and unzip it. (The file name may be a bit different, since the file also gets updated from time to time.)                     The unzipped file will be ~1.9GB, therefore it is a good idea to save and unzip it outside of the vault.
ast.target: 并解压。（文件名可能会略有不同，因为该文件会不时更新。）                     解压后的文件约为 1.9GB，因此建议在库外保存并解压。

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: This will only work when your attachment folder is your vault (default) or when it is a specific folder.
ast.target: 仅当你的附件文件夹为库（默认）或为特定文件夹时才会生效。

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: The path must start from your vault root.
ast.target: 路径必须从库根目录开始。

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: In your case, you don't need to input a path.
ast.target: 在你的情况下，你不需要输入路径。

ast.name: log
ast.source: loading Linked Data Helper plugin
ast.target: 正在加载 Linked Data Helper 插件

ast.name: log
ast.source: unloading Linked Data Helper plugin
ast.target: 正在卸载 Linked Data Helper 插件

ast.name: setButtonText
ast.source: Start conversion
ast.target: 开始转换

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Please input the absolute path to the extracted file.
ast.target: 请输入解压后文件的绝对路径。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When clicked, it will generate the three JSON files that the 			Linked Data Vocabularies plugin needs to work with LCSH.
ast.target: 点击后，将生成 Linked Data Vocabularies 插件与 LCSH 配合所需的三个 JSON 文件。

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Path of the extracted gzip (.gz) file
ast.target: 解压后的 gzip（.gz）文件路径

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Folder where the three generated JSON files should be saved
ast.target: 保存生成的三个 JSON 文件的文件夹

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Perform the conversion
ast.target: 执行转换

ast.name: setTooltip
ast.source: Click to start the conversion.
ast.target: 点击开始转换。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Please check your attachments setting under Files & Links.
ast.target: 请检查 Files & Links 下的附件设置。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: The conversion will start now. This may take some time. You will be notified when it is done.
ast.target: 转换将立即开始。这可能需要一些时间。完成后会通知你。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Something went wrong while parsing the file.
ast.target: 解析文件时出现错误。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: The three JSON files have been written.
ast.target: 三个 JSON 文件已写入。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Linked Data Helper Settings
ast.target: Linked Data Helper 设置

ast.name: text
ast.source: Settings for Library of Congress Linked Data
ast.target: 美国国会图书馆关联数据设置

ast.name: text
ast.source: LCSH Settings
ast.target: LCSH 设置

ast.name: text
ast.source: LC Subject Headings (LCSH) (MADS/RDF)
ast.target: LC 主题标目（LCSH）（MADS/RDF）

ast.name: text
ast.source: Note:
ast.target: 注意：

ast.name: text
ast.source: In your case, you need to specify in which folder the files shall be saved.
ast.target: 在你的情况下，你需要指定文件将保存在哪个文件夹中。
